ActivityFlowDecision.Decision: StartConnectorDirection is Nothing Or Not CorrigeStart
EndConnectorDirection is Nothing Or Not CorrigeEnd

ActivitySetOutPutParam.Value: If(EndCutAngle > Math.PI/2, EndCutAngle-Math.PI,If(EndCutAngle < - Math.PI/2 , EndCutAngle+Math.PI, EndCutAngle))
ActivitySetOutPutParam.DisplayName: EndCutAngle=If(EndCutAngle > Math.PI/2, EndCutAngle-Math.PI,If(EndCutAngle < - Math.PI/2 , EndCutAngle+Math.PI, EndCutAngle))

ActivitySetOutPutParam.Value: New GeometryPoint(EndPoint.X , EndPoint.Y, CFJ1 + Degrau + Diametro/2)
ActivitySetOutPutParam.DisplayName: EndPoint=New GeometryPoint(EndPoint.X , EndPoint.Y, CFJ1 + Degrau + Diametro/2)

ActivitySetOutPutParam.Value: New GeometryPoint(EndPoint.X, EndPoint.Y, EndSurfElevation1 - EndCover - Diametro/2-Parede)
ActivitySetOutPutParam.DisplayName: EndPoint=New GeometryPoint(EndPoint.X, EndPoint.Y, EndSurfElevation1 - EndCover - Diametro/2-Parede)

ActivitySetOutPutParam.Value: New GeometryPoint(StartPoint.X, StartPoint.Y, StartSurfElevation - StartCover - Parede - Diametro/2)
ActivitySetOutPutParam.DisplayName: StartPoint=New GeometryPoint(StartPoint.X, StartPoint.Y, StartSurfElevation - StartCover - Parede - Diametro/2)
